fields.name: Packed
fields.subtitle: packing list reminder
fields.promotional_text: Build reusable packing lists for trips and check off what is ready before you leave.
fields.description:
Packed locale-specific ASO proposal.

Highlights:
- Title, subtitle, and keywords designed for this locale's search behavior
- Natural wording balanced with relevant search terms
- Product meaning and compliance constraints preserved without direct translation

Review final description wording against actual features, screenshots, and App Review-safe claims.

Product context used for this proposal:
# Product Spec

## One-line Description

Packed helps users manage reusable packing groups and check items for the day.

## Core Value

- Reduce forgotten items through repeatable daily checklists.
- Keep packing setup lightweight.

## Target Users

- People preparing for school, work, travel, gym, or daily routines.

## Core Operation

- Create a group, add items, check today's packed state, and optionally get reminders.

## Free Features

- Packing groups and items.
- Daily check state.
- Settings and local reminders.

## Paid Feature Candidates

- Unknown. Possible candidates: unlimited groups, templates, themes.

## Non-goals

- Inventory management.
- Shared household/team packing.
- Server sync in v1.
fields.keywords: packing list,travel checklist,suitcase list,trip planner,vacation packing,suitcase,vacation

avoid_terms.reason: ranking claims are not allowed in App Store metadata
superlative claims invite App Review pushback

en-US.search_intent: Users searching broad category and use-case terms for this locale.

fields.description:
Packedのlocale別ASO提案です。

主な内容:
- このlocaleの検索意図に合わせたtitle/subtitle/keywords
- 自然な表現と検索語の両立
- base localeの直訳ではなく、機能意味と禁止表現を保った再設計

説明文は、実際の機能、スクリーンショット、App Review上の安全な表現に合わせて人間が最終確認してください。
